text.title: Benefits Realization Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Benefits Realization end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: identify-benefits
step.action: Extract candidate benefits. For each, name the metric.
step.decision-gate: If any benefit lacks a metric, STOP and reject.

step.name: quantify-and-baseline
step.action: Pull baseline_value with source query; freeze in writing with date.
step.decision-gate: If baseline missing, apply rule baseline-frozen — fail closed.

step.name: assign-business-owner
step.action: Assign business stakeholder as owner per benefit. PM cannot own.
step.decision-gate: If owner == PM, REJECT and reassign.

step.name: register-attribution-plan
step.action: For contested benefits, pre-register diff-in-diff or synthetic-control plan.
step.decision-gate: If contested AND no plan, STOP.

step.name: schedule-reviews-and-validate
step.action: Add 3/6/12-month checkpoints to calendar. Run validator. Publish register.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix violations before launch.
